svg.title: Anubis ct default sourced-map overlay
svg.desc: Anubis ct default teaching overlay. Contest Mid with a retreat plan, keep B alive through Water/Canal information, and stagger the first fights. Five players: A anchor: hold A Main / Heaven; B anchor: hold B Main / Temple; Mid info: contest Connector safely; Water hold: watch Canal / Water; Rotator: move through CT after call. The sourced overview remains the map layer; annotations are editorial and not pixel-perfect.
svg.text: Contest Mid with a retreat plan, keep B alive through Water/Canal information, and stagger the first fights.

g.text: Sourced overview: https://www.csgold.net/en/maps/anubis · local annotations are a teaching overlay, not a replacement radar.
